## Checklist

- [ ] The laws pass: web-safe palette, era font stacks, radius 0,
      linear/steps motion, decency (no autoplay/tracking/external calls)
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke` audit is clean
- [ ] Catalog entry, HTML snippet, and manifest regenerated/updated
- [ ] Docs page renders locally and reads well
- [ ] Size budgets respected (`npm run check:size`)
- [ ] Screenshots attached for anything visual (before/after)
- [ ] Commits are tidy: imperative, concise, no trailers
